topic: A smoke detector in my studio apartment chirps from a hallway my floor plan does not include
title: A Smoke Detector Chirps from a Hallway My Apartment Does Not Have | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A smoke detector in my apartment chirps from a hallway my floor plan does not include.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small studio apartment with a single blank north wall, dim overhead light, no doors visible on that wall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Studio apartment. One main room. One bathroom. No hallways.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small modern studio apartment with a bed visible on one side and a kitchenette on the other, dim warm light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Heard the chirp two months ago.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a person seated on a couch from behind facing a blank apartment wall, no face visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Chirp pattern was consistent. North wall. Smoke detector height. Every fifty four seconds.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a blank white drywall section with a digital clock on a side table reading nighttime hours, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a residential apartment hallway exterior at night with closed numbered doors lining the corridor, dim fluorescent overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My unit is the corner. No neighbor on that side.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an apartment building floor plan on paper showing a corner unit with no adjacent unit on the north side, dim desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand cutting through a section of drywall with a small utility knife, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Narrow corridor behind the wall. Smoke detector wired to nothing. Wooden beams.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hollow narrow space behind a cut drywall section with a small white smoke detector mounted to a wooden beam, dim flashlight beam visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photographed the corridor. Sent it to management.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a photo of a hidden hallway with a smoke detector visible on a wooden beam, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Management sent me the original building plans. The hallway is there. It has a door at the other end. Opens into my bedroom closet.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a printed architectural floor plan with a narrow corridor drawn between two units and a small doorway opening into a closet square, dim desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I screwed plywood over the wall opening.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a sheet of plywood screwed flush against a section of drywall with visible screw heads at each corner, dim apartment light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The detector still chirps. Same interval. From inside the closet now.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small bedroom at night with the closet door visibly closed, dim ambient light, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing
